summary: Backend-only testing for RCT Gestión Inmobiliaria. Created /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py with 7 pytest tests covering root, dashboard, properties (CRUD + cascade), units (CRUD + filter), tenants (CRUD + filter), reservations (CRUD + filter), and invoices AI flow (POST /api/invoices/analyze with real JPEG, GET list, GET one, DELETE, 404 on missing). All 7 tests passed (100%). Verified MongoDB _id is never leaked, property delete cascades to units, splits are computed correctly per tenant percentages, and GPT-4o vision via emergentintegrations responds successfully.

minor.issue: Does not return 404 when property does not exist (returns {ok:true} silently). Same for DELETE units/tenants/reservations/invoices. Idempotent but hides bad IDs from clients.
Cascade only deletes units; tenants and reservations are NOT cascade-deleted, leaving orphans referencing the deleted property/unit.
Uses TenantIn which would normally require 'name'; missing-id test had to send name='x' to reach the 404 branch (acceptable but Pydantic validation runs before the existence check).
monthly_expenses filter relies on invoice_date string starting with current YYYY-MM; if AI returns empty invoice_date, expenses are silently 0 for that invoice. Acceptable but worth noting.

action_items: Consider cascade-deleting tenants/reservations when a property/unit is removed, or warn the caller.
Optionally return 404 on DELETE of unknown ids for consistency.
Optionally validate split_percentage sums per property <= 100 when creating/updating tenants.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 498 lines, single-file; OK for now but split into routers/models if it grows.

Invoice.image_base64 stored capped at 200000 chars in Mongo - reasonable, but the cap silently truncates and the stored data may be unusable if needed later. Consider storing in GridFS or skipping persistence.
All endpoints return Pydantic models and exclude _id via projection {'_id':0} - good.
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY presence check returns 500 with Spanish message - good UX.
No input validation on split_percentage (could exceed 100 across tenants).
create_property/unit/tenant/reservation use 200 instead of 201 - minor REST convention deviation.
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own TEST_-prefixed entities and clean them up in finally blocks. Did not modify pre-existing seed data (2 properties, 6 units, 3 tenants).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints under /api prefix. Tests cover full CRUD, cascade-delete (units only), filter params, 404 paths, and the AI invoice analyze flow with a real JPEG (synthetic invoice generated via PIL as fallback; primary path fetches Unsplash). Invoice analyze takes ~3-5s; uses gpt-4o via emergentintegrations. _id leakage verified absent. Re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA - all tests passing.
